headline: Align Technology Shareholder Meeting Rights May Influence Future Board Decisions
summary: Align Technology has amended its corporate bylaws to let certain shareholders call special meetings. The new right applies to investors who have continuously held at least 25% of the company’s common stock for one year. This change gives large, long term shareholders a formal way to request meetings outside the regular annual schedule. Align Technology (NasdaqGS:ALGN) is making this governance adjustment at a time when the shares trade around $174.0. The stock shows mixed recent...
